description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity on the weekends before implementation of the special traffic arr
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 清明節特別交通安排實施前的週末和合石墳場內及附近一帶的交通

2026-03-06T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity on the weekends before implementation of the special traffic arrangements for Ching Ming Festival

Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity (including Tai Wo Service Road West, Wah Ming Road, Wo Hing Road and Pak Wo Road, etc. ) is expected to be busier on the weekends before implementation of the special traffic arrangements for Ching Ming Festival. The Police will implement temporary traffic control measures depending on actual situation. Motorists are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through media. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police. 
.
2026-03-06T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
清明節特別交通安排實施前的週末和合石墳場內及附近一帶的交通

公眾人士請留意，和合石墳場內及附近一帶路道（包括大窩西支路、華明路、和興路及百和路等）的交通預計在清明節特別交通安排實施前的週末將會較為繁忙，警方會視乎實際情況在上述道路實施臨時交通管制措施。駕駛人士請留意傳媒發放的最新交通消息。如遇交通受阻，駕駛人士請保持忍讓，並遵從警方的指示。
。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) scheduling arrangements and additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)車務調度及加開臨時列車車次

2026-03-06T17:43:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) train service will be adjusted as follows: • Schedules of some train trips will be adjusted from 2 Feb to 14 Mar Purchase your tickets up to 15 days ahead of travel: • 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app • Appointed travel agents (Click here) • Hong Kong West Kowloon Station o Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay) o Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time Train schedules: • 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app • High Speed Rail website or mobile app
2026-03-06T17:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)列車服務將作出以下調整： •2 月2日至3 月14日部份列車班次時間調整。 如需購買15天內的車票： •12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 •指定代理 •前往香港西九龍站 o 使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶） o 使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間 列車服務詳情： •12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 •高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式

2026-03-08T15:42:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2026-03-08T15:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。
